query:
SELECT id, transaction_id, payment_time, created_by, updated_by, section FROM payment_transactions WHERE section='ff365' AND payment_time IS NULL LIMIT 10;
SELECT COUNT(*) as null_pt, MIN(id) as min_id, MAX(id) as max_id FROM payment_transactions WHERE section='ff365' AND payment_time IS NULL;
